infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: FitTrack needs your location to track your workout route.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: FitTrack needs background location to keep tracking your workout even when the screen is off.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: FitTrack needs background location to keep tracking your workout even when the screen is off.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow FitTrack to use your location to track your workouts.
